uniformity.metric: Herfindahl concentration (HHI) per dimension, averaged over the 6 populated dims; 1.0 = identical metadata across every question in the tag

dev_stage.note: ONLY dimension that differentiates questions within a tag

primary_capability.note: every tag has exactly one capability value

signal_family.note: uniform where present; absent in 144 tags

requested_vs_available_scope.top_500_bridge_tags_requested: only 325 bridge tags exist in total
requested_vs_available_scope.top_250_concerns_requested: 5357 clarity concern_ids exist; severity-ranked subset reportable
requested_vs_available_scope.top_1000_questions_requested: reportable, but enrichment priority is better expressed per-tag (325) since metadata is tag-inherited

projections_NOT_MEASURED.basis: AQ-2R already MEASURED that a within-pool re-rank on tag-level metadata yields ~0 delta on signal/construct (signal/age/behavior/capability are uniform within a pool); only dev_stage moved.
projections_NOT_MEASURED.differentiability_target_after_C2: projection only: 0.096 -> ~0.35-0.55 achievable, BUT capped by genuinely low-cardinality dims (age=4, persona=5, stage=5 can never differentiate much); real headroom is behavior(119)/capability(286)/signal(87 + fix 44% missing coverage)
projections_NOT_MEASURED.trust_score_impact: directional positive; AQ-2R measured selection-trust +3.8 with tag-level metadata; question-level enrichment expected to extend this, magnitude unproven until C-2 measured
projections_NOT_MEASURED.routing_accuracy_gain: bounded by the 76.3% of questions in high-uniformity pools that currently cannot be differentiated; not quantifiable pre-enrichment
